title: Inserting data to the default graph doesn't work
key_bug_features: Inserting data to default graph without specifying it
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> INSERT DATA { <http://example/book1> dc:title "A new book" ; dc:creator "A.N.Other" . };
SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <urn:sparql:tests:insert:data> { <http://example/book2> dc:title "Another book" ; dc:creator "Someone" . } };
SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> SELECT ?s ?p ?o FROM <urn:sparql:tests:insert:data> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o };
SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> SELECT ?s ?p ?o FROM <urn:sparql:tests:insert:data> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o };
SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <urn:sparql:tests:insert:data> { <http://example/book3> dc:title "Third book" . } };
SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> INSERT DATA { <http://example/book4> dc:title "Default graph book" . };
SPARQL PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/> SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o FILTER(?s = <http://example/book4>) };
